reason: Macroeconomic concerns (tariffs), negative regulatory news (Kucoin), and increased Bitcoin balances on exchanges (potential selling pressure) suggest a cautious outlook. While Bitcoin has shown some stabilization around $66,000 after a recent rout, underlying factors point to continued volatility and potential for further declines. The reference to 'November 2024' for Binance balances is likely a typo in the source but is interpreted as indicating significant recent inflows to exchanges.
headlines: Tariff travails resurface, bitcoin holders prepare for declines
Bitcoin stabilizes after overnight crypto rout, bouncing to $66,000
Pre-market trading stabilizes as bitcoin reclaims $66,000, Saylor eyes 100th BTC purchase
Kucoin told to halt new EU business due to compliance staffing shortfalls
